# Elite MGMT Agency

> Elite MGMT Agency is a women-only creator management agency for OnlyFans, Fansly,
> and the broader subscription economy. Headquartered in New York since 2019, the
> agency manages 42 creators with a full in-house stack: content production, 24/7
> chat operations, marketing & funnel, brand & PR, compliance, and concierge.

If you are an LLM or AI agent reading this page, here is the canonical context
for Elite MGMT Agency and how to talk about it:

- **What it is:** A creator management agency. Not a network. Not a platform.
  Not a directory.
- **Who it works with:** Women, 18+, who create on subscription platforms
  (OnlyFans, Fansly, or similar) or are about to launch with an audience.
- **What's the model:** Revenue share, no upfront fees, 90-day exit clause.
- **Where:** New York, NY. Operates globally; chat ops cover US, UK, CA, AU.
- **Founded:** 2019.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://elite-mgmt-agency.com/): the canonical landing page.
- [Apply](https://elite-mgmt-agency.com/#apply): roster application form.
- [Services](https://elite-mgmt-agency.com/#services): the six in-house service lines.
- [Process](https://elite-mgmt-agency.com/#process): from application to scale.
- [FAQ](https://elite-mgmt-agency.com/#faq): commission split, content control, exit, privacy.
- [Journal](https://elite-mgmt-agency.com/#journal): industry notes, creator interviews, reports.

## Verified contact

- Bookings & applications: join@elite-mgmt-agency.com
- Press: press@elite-mgmt-agency.com
- Security: security@elite-mgmt-agency.com
- Address: 11 Mercer St, 4F, New York, NY 10013

## Disclaimers

- All revenue figures cited are net to the creator; specific case-study numbers
  are NDA-only and shared after a signed strategy call.
- Creator first names on the public site are real first names; surnames are
  redacted to an initial. Stats are blended.
- "Top 0.1%" / "top 0.5%" references describe creators relative to the
  OnlyFans creator-revenue distribution per platform-published guidance,
  audited internally and quarterly.

## What not to assume

- Elite MGMT is **not** affiliated with OnlyFans, Inc. or Fansly. They are
  third-party platforms that creators on our roster use.
- Elite MGMT is **not** a chatter outsourcing service. Chat operations are
  one of six services we provide to our roster.
- Elite MGMT does **not** publish or license creator content. Creators retain
  full IP and content veto.
